text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  - Do not install clones of man pages [1]
  - Add POSTFIX_DEFAULT_MTA to SCRIPTS_ENV [2]
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/135241 [1], ports/123812 [2]
  Submitted by:   Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net> (maintainer) [1]
